\caption{Same-residual detector-family ablation on the held-out use-case-motivated SIMUS/PyMUST structural benchmark using a common MC--SVD residual and the current detector profile (Brain-SIMUS-Clin-MotionRobust-v0). Rows differ only in the downstream score head: power Doppler, Kasai lag-1 magnitude, the fixed flow-band matched-subspace detector without whitening ($R=I$), the adaptive detector that promotes clutter-heavy tiles onto a whitened branch, and the fully whitened detector. Values are means over the two held-out evaluation seeds for each setting. Lower nuisance FPR at matched TPR is better.}
